message:
chore(beads): update issue tracker (3 closed, 7 now in-progress)

Issue status updates from concurrent agent work:

Closed:
- bd-13pqz (DROPIN-113): parity gap ledger with severity and ownership
- bd-2my4b (DROPIN-122): JSON mode event schema parity (already closed
  in prior round, re-synced)
- bd-c9usa (DROPIN-132): embeddable SDK core — closed with
  create_agent_session(), SessionOptions, AgentSessionHandle delivered

In-progress:
- Multiple DROPIN tasks advancing toward completion across SDK
  stabilization, streaming optimization, and config parity surfaces

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
